title: MusicalKey
description: Cross-Platform application to help producers and DJs to create music without any music theory. The application uses SuperpoweredSDK to provide information on audio files.

title: Personal Server
description: Created a server on a Dell PowerEdge running VMware eSXi as a personal cloud, DHCP server, VPN and more, using Let’s Encrypt for public facing services (Nextcloud, Taiga)

title: Portfolio Website v1
description: Personal portfolio website that is no longer maintained. It has been replaced w/ v2
